channel.title: Azure News Feed
channel.description: Aggregated daily news from Azure blogs

item.title: My C drive is running out of space, so I want to upgrade to Windows 11 26H1 to clean up junk files.
item.description: My C drive is almost full, mainly because the WinSxS and AppData folders are taking up space and are difficult to delete. I’m thinking of upgrading to 26H1 to free up some space. Will CS:GO run without errors on 26H1? If it works fine, I plan to test it in a virtual machine first before installing...
item.dc:creator: Stonehu

item.title: Occasional frame drops when minimizing windows in Windows 11
item.description: My computer has sufficient performance, and the monitor has a high refresh rate. When I open a window, wait a while, and then minimize it, I experience frame drops, but this doesn’t happen if I interact with the window continuously. I’m looking for a solution.
item.dc:creator: Kodyon

item.title: My laptop gets stuck on the logo screen after restarting following a Windows 11 installation
item.description: After installing Windows 11, the system gets stuck on the brand logo screen during restart and won't boot into the OS. Please help with a solution.
item.dc:creator: Komondor2240

item.title: Windows 11 displays a black screen at startup and won't load the desktop
item.description: My computer suddenly shut down on its own. After restarting, the screen remains black, and I can't boot into the system normally. Please help.
item.dc:creator: Castiellm

item.title: After reinstalling Windows 11, the system frequently restarts while gaming
item.description: After reinstalling Windows 11, my computer frequently restarts on its own when I play games, but everything works fine during light use, such as watching videos or doing everyday office work. I’d like to know the possible causes, as well as how to troubleshoot and resolve the issue.
item.dc:creator: DaxxonSawyer

item.title: Right-clicking on taskbar shortcuts, Wi-Fi, or the clock area in Windows 11 also does not work
item.description: After the Windows 11 automatic update, I can left-click on taskbar shortcuts but cannot right-click them; when I click on the Wi-Fi, volume, or clock icons, I see a loading animation but they won’t open at all. The problem persists after restarting. Please help.
item.dc:creator: Wrentdr

item.title: The Start menu and the Win key in Windows 11 sometimes fail to open
item.description: While using Windows 11, the Start menu and the Windows logo key on the keyboard suddenly stop working completely; neither clicking nor pressing them produces any response. I have tried the following steps, but none of them worked:Pressing Fn + Win to confirm that the Win key lock is not...
item.dc:creator: Lucienw

item.title: How to free up space on iphone quickly when phone storage is full?
item.description: Hi everyone,I have an iPhone that keeps telling me my phone storage is full. I don't know much about phones, so I'm looking for simple steps to free up storage on my iPhone quickly.Here's what I want to learn:The fastest things to delete first – like maybe old texts, photos, or app data?How to...
item.dc:creator: garland

item.title: My iPhone screen frozen. How can I unfreeze an unresponsive iPhone?
item.description: I'm hoping someone can walk me through this.My iPhone screen is totally frozen—can't swipe, can't tap, and the phone doesn't react to anything. I can't turn off, too. The screen is just stuck on one app. What are the actual button sequences to force a restart on a modern iPhone?I've heard something...
item.dc:creator: OregonRain

item.title: The Microsoft Graph PowerShell SDK and the additionalProperties Property
item.description: The additionalProperties property is available for many Microsoft Graph PowerShell SDK cmdlets. In this article, we explain the function of the additionalProperties property and how it functions in holding output for Microsoft Graph PowerShell SDK cmdlets. It’s all because of the lack of...
item.dc:creator: TonyRedmond

item.title: Need help for Windows 11 Pro ISO 64 bit download
item.description: I went to the Windows 11 ISO download page but there is no option for downloading Windows 11 Pro. In fact, I want to use BitLocker drive encryption on my PC. I understand that BitLocker is only available on the Pro, Enterprise, and Education editions of Windows 11, not on Home.Where is the best...
item.dc:creator: Hupixdel

item.title: Leveraging Azure Resource Graph Queries for Azure Redis Configuration
item.description: Scenario Many times, we receive requests for a quick and reliable way to review Azure Redis configurations such as SKU tiers, Redis versions, TLS settings, Microsoft Entra authentication status, and public network exposure. Traditionally, these checks are performed using PowerShell, Azure CLI, or...
item.dc:creator: Soma_Sekhara_Raju

item.title: Leveraging Azure Resource Graph Queries for Azure Storage Configuration
item.description: Scenario Many times, we receive requests for a quick and reliable way to check which Azure Storage features are enabled across subscriptions—such as SFTP, Hierarchical Namespace (HNS), or default access tiers. For such scenarios, customers can use PowerShell, Azure CLI, or REST APIs; however, these...
item.dc:creator: jainsourabh

item.title: How to Troubleshoot Azure Functions Host Startup Issue
item.description: Overview Azure Functions is a powerful serverless compute service that enables you to run event-driven code without managing infrastructure. When you deploy a Function App, the Azure Functions host is the runtime process responsible for discovering your functions, loading extensions and bindings,...
item.dc:creator: vikasgupta5

item.title: From Playwright Automation to Agent Driven Testing (GHCP in Action)
item.description: What Is Agent-Driven Testing? Agent-driven testing represents a revolutionary shift from traditional, hardcoded test automation to intelligent, adaptive testing powered by AI agents. Unlike conventional Playwright tests that rely on static selectors and predefined workflows, agent-driven testing...
item.dc:creator: syedarshad

item.title: Service Bus SBMP Retirement: What BizTalk Server 2020 Customers Need to Know
item.description: On September 30, 2026, the Azure Service Bus team will retire support for the Service Bus Messaging Protocol (SBMP). This is important BizTalk Server 2020 customers who use the BizTalk Service Bus (SB-Messaging) adapter, as SBMP is the protocol that adapter relies on today. To help customers...
item.dc:creator: hcamposu

item.title: GitHub Copilot meets Azure Developer CLI: AI-assisted project setup and error troubleshooting
item.description: The Azure Developer CLI (azd) now integrates with GitHub Copilot for AI-assisted project scaffolding and intelligent deployment error troubleshooting, helping you resolve common Azure errors like MissingSubscriptionRegistration, SkuNotAvailable, and StorageAccountAlreadyTaken without leaving the...
item.dc:creator: Kristen Womack

item.title: Writing Node.js addons with .NET Native AOT
item.description: The C# Dev Kit team replaced C++ Node.js addons with C# and Native AOT, removing a dependency on Python. This post walks through building a Node.js native addon entirely in C# using N-API, LibraryImport, and UnmanagedCallersOnly. The post Writing Node.js addons with .NET Native AOT appeared first...
item.dc:creator: Drew Noakes

item.title: Changes to GitHub Copilot Individual plans
item.description: We're making these changes to ensure a reliable and predictable experience for existing customers. The post Changes to GitHub Copilot Individual plans appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Joe Binder

item.title: Troubleshoot with OpenTelemetry in Azure Monitor - Public Preview
item.description: OpenTelemetry is fast becoming the industry standard for modern telemetry collection and ingestion pipelines. With Azure Monitor’s new OpenTelemetry Protocol (OTLP) support, you can ship logs, metrics, and traces from wherever you run workloads to analyze and act on your observability data in one...
item.dc:creator: KayodePrince

item.title: Autonomous AKS Incident Response with Azure SRE Agent: From Alert to Verified Recovery in Minutes
item.description: When a Sev1 alert fires on an AKS cluster, detection is rarely the hard part. The hard part is what comes next: proving what broke, why it broke, and fixing it without widening the blast radius, all under time pressure, often at 2 a.m. Azure SRE Agent is designed to close that gap. It connects...
item.dc:creator: hailukassa

item.title: Secure, Keyless Application Access with Managed Identities - Now GA in Azure Files SMB
item.description: As enterprises modernize applications and strengthen their security posture, identity is central to how applications access shared storage. Traditional identity models relying on account keys, stored credentials, or domain‑joined infrastructure add operational overhead and introduce security risks...
item.dc:creator: Priyanka-Gangal

item.title: Changes to GitHub Copilot plans for individuals
item.description: As shared in our recent blog post, we’re making the following changes to Copilot plans for individuals as part of our ongoing efforts to ensure service reliability and a sustainable… The post Changes to GitHub Copilot plans for individuals appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Microsoft 365 Security Best Practices for Enterprises
item.description: In today’s digital-first workplace, Microsoft 365 has become the backbone of enterprise productivity. From email and file storage to collaboration tools like Teams and SharePoint, it centralizes critical business operations. But with this convenience comes a growing attack surface. Cyber threats...
item.dc:creator: JohnNaguib

item.title: Highlights from Git 2.54
item.description: The open source Git project just released Git 2.54. Here is GitHub’s look at some of the most interesting features and changes introduced since last time. The post Highlights from Git 2.54 appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Taylor Blau

item.title: Priority Cleanup V2: Faster, Simpler Data Purging for Exchange Online
item.description: Enhancements Achieved with Exchange Priority Cleanup V2 Priority Cleanup (Use priority cleanup to expedite the permanent deletion of sensitive information from mailboxes | Microsoft Learn) was introduced to provide administrators with a powerful tool for permanently deleting mailbox content, even...
item.dc:creator: Victor Legat

item.title: Change Optics Report released into Public Preview to showcase messages impacted by future changes
item.description: Change Management is an important part of managing the improvements we make to our service that may sometimes disrupt our customers. The key is empowering customers to identify if they have messages that will be affected when we announce changes to the service. To that end, we’d like to announce...
item.dc:creator: The_Exchange_Team

item.title: Making opportunistic cyberattacks harder by design
item.description: How Microsoft secures Dynamics 365 and Power Platform by removing credentials, reducing attack surfaces, and using platform engineering to block opportunistic threats. The post Making opportunistic cyberattacks harder by design appeared first on Microsoft Security Blog.
item.dc:creator: Ilya Grebnov

item.title: Announcing new hybrid deployment options for Azure Virtual Desktop
item.description: Azure Virtual Desktop is a secured, cloud-based virtual desktop infrastructure (VDI) service that enables organizations to deliver Windows desktops and applications to users. Originally launched in 2019, Azure Virtual Desktop has evolved rapidly to meet the changing needs of modern workplaces,...
item.dc:creator: Steve_Downs

item.title: Sunsetting SHA-1 in HTTPS on GitHub
item.description: What’s changing We’re going to remove the use of SHA-1 in HTTPS for GitHub and our CDNs. This impacts browsers that are used to view the GitHub website, any software… The post Sunsetting SHA-1 in HTTPS on GitHub appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Evolving Agentic Applications on Microsoft Fabric: From Automated Deployment to Integrating Data Agents
item.description: In our previous post, Operationalizing Agentic Applications with Microsoft Fabric, we focused on a core challenge teams encounter once an agentic application moves beyond a proof of concept: operational reality. Specifically, how do you observe, govern, evaluate, and analyze what agents are doing...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: Orchestrate dbt jobs activity in your Fabric pipelines (Preview)
item.description: Coordinating dbt runs with upstream ingestion and downstream consumption often requires complex solutions and different tools. You can now add a dbt job activity (Preview) directly to your Fabric pipelines. This lets you orchestrate dbt transformations alongside other pipeline activities, so you...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: Simplify On-prem File share Migration to Azure: Discover & assess suitability using Azure Migrate
item.description: Migrating on‑premises file servers to the cloud is a complex infrastructure transformation—not just a data move. Many organizations lack the visibility needed to decide whether to rehost or modernize file shares spread across Windows and Linux servers. Azure Migrate now extends its discovery and...
item.dc:creator: bapic

item.title: Secure your data streams: How to choose the right network security feature in Eventstream
item.description: Eventstream in Fabric Real-Time Intelligence stream data from both inside and outside the Fabric platform. When your external sources sit behind firewalls or in private networks, choosing the right network security feature is essential. This post breaks down the available options in Eventstream and...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: Translytical Task Flows (Generally Available)
item.description: Translytical task flows take interactive Power BI reports to the next level where users can update records, add annotations, and trigger actions in external systems—all without leaving the report. With translytical task flows, report consumers become active participants. Instead of viewing data and...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: Camera Missing from Device Manager – Troubleshooting Required
item.description: Problem Summary:The laptop camera is not working. It is not detected by Windows or by applications such as Teams, Zoom, or Camera app. Symptoms Observed: Camera does not open in any application Camera app shows “No camera found” Camera is missing from Device Manager under Camera or Imaging Devices...
item.dc:creator: wasim1

item.title: Former short-term employee added as Billing Admin
item.description: Hi everyone, I’m hoping to get some insight into how this could have occurred and what we should review to prevent it from happening again. We are a small organization, and we recently discovered that a former employee (who only worked with us for about two weeks) was listed as a Billing...
item.dc:creator: ty_zar

item.title: Discoverable – Observable MCP Server
item.description: How to build an observable MCP Server with discoverable tools and agents. The post Discoverable – Observable MCP Server appeared first on ISE Developer Blog.
item.dc:creator: Colin Desmond

item.title: Adobe reader update deployment via Intune
item.description: Hi Team, can we integrate and deploy Adobe reader update automatically via Intune or we need to create package and deploy latest version every month.
item.dc:creator: KarthickJokirathinam

item.title: Edge update deployment via Intune
item.description: Hi Team, I am planning to deploy edge stable channel update from intune every month. Can anyone share the process & configuration settings in intune
item.dc:creator: KarthickJokirathinam

item.title: Building an Enterprise HR Chatbot with Multi-Strategy RAG and Live Agent Handoff on Azure
item.description: HR teams deal with thousands of employee questions every day — policy lookups, leave balances, case escalations, and sensitive topics like harassment or misconduct. AI chatbots can handle the routine stuff and free up HR advisors for the hard cases. But most chatbot projects get stuck at basic Q&A....
item.dc:creator: risthakur1213

item.title: what happened to my robux digital gift card in Microsoft rewards?
item.description: Hello everyone so what happened to my robux digital gift card in microsoft rewardsthis happened a long time ago to me but im following up about this topic just nowmicrosoft can you please bring back the robux digital gift card? i already have enough points for it and im also a bit sad as well. ok...
item.dc:creator: Isaiah_Cacho_95

item.title: Network Connectivity Check APIs for Logic App Standard
item.description: Introduction When your Logic App Standard is integrated with a Virtual Network (VNET), you can use these APIs to troubleshoot connectivity issues to downstream resources like SQL databases, Storage Accounts, Service Bus, Key Vault, and more. The checks run directly from the worker hosting your...
item.dc:creator: Mohammed_Barqawi

item.title: AKS App Routing's Next Chapter: Gateway API with Istio
item.description: If you've been following my previous posts on the Ingress NGINX retirement, you'll know the story so far. The community Ingress NGINX project was retired in March 2026, and Microsoft's extended support for the NGINX-based App Routing add-on runs until November 2026. I've covered migrating from...
item.dc:creator: samcogan

item.title: Step by Step Guide to Ontology and Plan for Financial Service
item.description: What We Will Build In this guide, we will construct a complete Fabric IQ solution that accomplishes the following: First, a Lakehouse that ingests publicly available data including bank financials, P2P lending statistics, borrower demographics, and licensing information. Second, a Semantic Model...
item.dc:creator: NaufalPrawironegoro

item.title: i want to log out of insider
item.description: i want to log out of insider without loss my data what should i do i donot want to have update from it
item.dc:creator: mostafaamir

item.title: Azure Virtual Desktop in the Perth Azure Extended Zone: A Real‑World Production Deployment
item.description: Introduction Perth is one of the most geographically isolated major cities globally. For performance‑sensitive, graphics‑heavy engineering workloads, user experience can degrade significantly when desktops are hosted far from the user. For workloads such as subsurface modelling and GPU‑intensive...
item.dc:creator: akashmishra

item.title: Windows 11 Insider Preview Feature Update (26300.8276) Wont Download
item.description: Hello All, Having issues clearing out updates. This one wont download. Any recommendations to resolve?
item.dc:creator: PhxAlex

item.title: Verbose Status Improvement
item.description: Hi, I had a idea where for verbose status, you should make it so if its set to 2, it will display the verbose messages under shutdown or restart, example:Restarting(Stopping service: Windows Modules Installer)or make it next to it likeRestarting (Stopping Service: Windows Modules Installer)
item.dc:creator: gamingdivy_Win11Pro25H2

item.title: How do I fix an abnormal screen and system freeze during Windows 11 startup?
item.description: After starting up, Win11 always enters an abnormal interface (e.g., blue screen/BIOS) and sometimes freezes or restarts. How can this be investigated?
item.dc:creator: CedricRichmond
